name: Baizhu, and the stars.
description:
Yo yo yo! I’m back! So life update. Finally got on some anti depressants, I’m with the love of my life, and I’ll seemly pass my classes! I hope life is just as good!!! If not, feel free to vent in the comments! You guys are strong, believe in yourself. <3

(Ps: There’s a make your own plot option as well, hehehe!~)
creator: IHateMyselfXD
